'''Manda D'ulin''' was the leader of the group of six [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] warrior-women.

==Biography==
She was contacted in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] by a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] named [[Kellering]], who claimed that he was looking for additional security to protect the [[Hammertong/Legends|Hammertong]] project on behalf of Dr. [[Eloy]].

However, when she traveled with Kellering to the base to meet Eloy, she was attacked and gunned down by Imperial troops, followed soon after by her comrade [[Pav D'armon]]. In reprisal, the rest of the Mistryl team attacked the base, and stole the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|Strike Cruiser]] carrying the Hammertong prototype.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Hammertong: The Tale of the "Tonnika Sisters"|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{Ab|Hammertong (audiobook)}} {{1st}}
